input: Create a plugin called 'code-review' for automated code review workflows
expected_behavior: Scaffolds complete plugin directory: .claude-plugin/plugin.json, commands/, agents/, skills/, hooks/hooks.json, scripts/, settings.json, CLAUDE.md, README.md. All files have valid frontmatter.

input: Add a 'run-review' command to the code-review plugin
expected_behavior: Creates commands/run-review.md with proper frontmatter (description, user-invocable: true), ROLE section, PROTOCOL section, OUTPUT CONFIGURATION, and CONSTRAINTS. Verb-first naming enforced.

input: Create an agent called 'reviewer' for the code-review plugin
expected_behavior: Creates agents/reviewer.md with frontmatter (name, description, co-authored-by), role definition, responsibilities, and assigned skills.

input: Add a skill called 'static-analysis' with full MOAT structure
expected_behavior: Creates skills/static-analysis/SKILL.md with frontmatter (name, description with triggers, allowed-tools), guiding principle, procedure, quality criteria, and anti-patterns. References directory structure included.

input: Set up hooks for the code-review plugin that validate on file writes
expected_behavior: Creates hooks/hooks.json with PostToolUse hook matching Write|Edit, referencing a validation script in scripts/. Script file created and marked executable.
